subsystems.implemented_scope: Phase-0 startup fixture path is exported and fixture-backed, but `__libc_start_main`, `__frankenlibc_startup_phase0`, and snapshot capture remain host-backed in the support taxonomy.
subsystems.deferred_scope: Full native `csu`/TLS init-order hardening and secure-mode closure campaign remains open.
subsystems.doc_line: - `startup`: `IMPLEMENTED_PARTIAL` — fixture-backed phase-0 startup path is exported but support-taxonomy rows remain host-backed for `__libc_start_main`, `__frankenlibc_startup_phase0`, and snapshot capture. Deferred scope: full native `csu`/TLS init-order hardening and secure-mode closure campaign.

subsystems.implemented_scope: Runtime-math threading routing and selected pthread semantics are live, including lifecycle and rwlock native routing.
subsystems.doc_line: - `threading`: `IN_PROGRESS` — implemented scope: runtime-math threading routing and selected pthread semantics are live, including lifecycle and rwlock native routing. Deferred scope: close lifecycle/TLS stress beads.

subsystems.implemented_scope: Bootstrap numeric resolver ABI is exported; `getnameinfo` and `gai_strerror` are native, while `getaddrinfo` and `freeaddrinfo` remain host-backed in the support taxonomy.
subsystems.deferred_scope: Full retry/cache/poisoning hardening campaign remains open.
subsystems.doc_line: - `resolver`: `IMPLEMENTED_PARTIAL` — bootstrap numeric resolver ABI is exported; `getnameinfo` and `gai_strerror` are native, while `getaddrinfo` and `freeaddrinfo` remain host-backed in the support taxonomy. Deferred scope: full retry/cache/poisoning hardening campaign.

subsystems.implemented_scope: Passwd/group reentrant APIs have native rows, while primary lookup APIs remain host-backed in `pwd_abi`/`grp_abi`.
subsystems.deferred_scope: Hosts/backend breadth plus NSS concurrency/cache-coherence closure remain pending.
subsystems.doc_line: - `nss`: `IMPLEMENTED_PARTIAL` — passwd/group reentrant APIs have native rows, while primary lookup APIs remain host-backed in `pwd_abi`/`grp_abi`. Deferred scope: hosts/backend breadth plus NSS concurrency/cache-coherence closure.

subsystems.implemented_scope: Bootstrap locale ABI path is implemented for `setlocale` and `localeconv`.
subsystems.doc_line: - `locale`: `IMPLEMENTED_PARTIAL` — implemented scope: bootstrap `setlocale`/`localeconv` C/POSIX path. Deferred scope: catalog, collation, and transliteration parity expansion.

subsystems.implemented_scope: Phase-1 codec core and fixtures exist, but `iconv_open`/`iconv`/`iconv_close` remain host-backed in the support taxonomy.
subsystems.deferred_scope: Full native `iconvdata` breadth and deterministic table-generation closure remain open.
subsystems.doc_line: - `iconv`: `IMPLEMENTED_PARTIAL` — phase-1 codec core and fixtures exist, but `iconv_open`/`iconv`/`iconv_close` remain host-backed in the support taxonomy; codec scope/exclusions are locked in `tests/conformance/iconv_codec_scope_ledger.v1.json`. Deferred scope: full native `iconvdata` breadth and deterministic table-generation closure.
